info.title: kiapi Common API
info.description:
Common kiapi endpoints.

Static capability docs:
- **kiapi Chat API** - OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions for text and multimodal conversations. [Swagger UI](v1/chat/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/chat/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/chat/openapi.json)
- **kiapi Embedding API** - Create text and multimodal embeddings for retrieval and similarity search. [Swagger UI](v1/embedding/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/embedding/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/embedding/openapi.json)
- **kiapi DepthPro API** - Estimate depth maps from input images. [Swagger UI](v1/image/depthpro/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/depthpro/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/depthpro/openapi.json)
- **kiapi ERNIE-Image API** - Generate, edit, and train LoRA adapters for ERNIE-Image models. [Swagger UI](v1/image/ernie/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/ernie/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/ernie/openapi.json)
- **kiapi FLUX.2 API** - Generate, edit, and train LoRA adapters for FLUX.2 image models. [Swagger UI](v1/image/flux2/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/flux2/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/flux2/openapi.json)
- **kiapi Ideogram 4 API** - Generate images from text prompts with Ideogram 4. [Swagger UI](v1/image/ideogram4/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/ideogram4/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/ideogram4/openapi.json)
- **kiapi Qwen Image API** - Generate and edit images with Qwen Image models. [Swagger UI](v1/image/qwen/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/qwen/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/qwen/openapi.json)
- **kiapi SeedVR2 API** - Upscale and restore images with SeedVR2. [Swagger UI](v1/image/seedvr2/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/seedvr2/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/seedvr2/openapi.json)
- **kiapi Z-Image API** - Generate images and train LoRA adapters with Z-Image models. [Swagger UI](v1/image/zimage/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/image/zimage/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/image/zimage/openapi.json)
- **kiapi ACE-Step API** - Generate songs, covers, repaints, and stems with ACE-Step. [Swagger UI](v1/audio/acestep/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/audio/acestep/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/audio/acestep/openapi.json)
- **kiapi AudioGen API** - Generate short sound effects from text prompts. [Swagger UI](v1/audio/audiogen/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/audio/audiogen/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/audio/audiogen/openapi.json)
- **kiapi LTX-2 API** - Generate video from text, image, and music or audio inputs. [Swagger UI](v1/video/ltx2/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/video/ltx2/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/video/ltx2/openapi.json)
- **kiapi Web API** - Search the web and fetch pages as Markdown or PDF artifacts. [Swagger UI](v1/web/docs.html), [ReDoc](v1/web/redoc.html), [OpenAPI JSON](v1/web/openapi.json)

get.description:
Inspect server readiness, queue depth, resident model memory, and relay.

Use this endpoint to see whether warmup has finished, how many jobs are
queued behind the single-flight worker, which resident models currently
count against the global memory budget, and whether the relay started with
the server is running.

List stored files.

Files include explicit uploads and generated artifacts. File records are
disk-backed and can outlive in-memory jobs across process restarts.

post.description:
Store a file and return a reusable file_id.

Uploaded files become persistent Files API records. Use the returned
file_id as a FileRef input for generation/editing endpoints, or download
the bytes later with GET /v1/files/{file_id}/download.

get.description:
Get metadata for a stored file.

This returns metadata only, not file bytes. Use the download endpoint when
the client needs the artifact body.

parameters.name: file_id

schema.description: Persistent file id returned by the Files API.
schema.title: File Id

parameters.description: Persistent file id returned by the Files API.

delete.description:
Delete a stored file.

Deleting a file removes the stored bytes and metadata. Existing job records
may still mention the deleted file_id in artifacts, but the file can no
longer be downloaded.

parameters.name: file_id

schema.description: Persistent file id returned by the Files API.
schema.title: File Id

parameters.description: Persistent file id returned by the Files API.

get.description:
Download stored file bytes.

The response media type is the stored file's content_type, such as
image/png, audio/wav, video/mp4, text/markdown, or application/pdf.

parameters.name: file_id

schema.description: Persistent file id returned by the Files API.
schema.title: File Id

parameters.description: Persistent file id returned by the Files API.

get.description:
List in-memory jobs.

Every generation request creates a job, including sync requests. Jobs are
useful for progress polling, result inspection, and discovering artifact
file_ids. They are not persisted across process restarts.

Get a job's status, progress, result, and artifacts.

Poll this endpoint after an async response or after a sync request times
out. When status is succeeded, artifact file ids can be downloaded through
the Files API.

parameters.name: job_id

schema.description: In-memory job id returned by async or sync inference requests.
schema.title: Job Id

parameters.description: In-memory job id returned by async or sync inference requests.

delete.description:
Remove a job record from the in-memory store.

Queued jobs are forgotten and effectively canceled. A running job cannot be
interrupted; deleting it only removes the record, and generated files are
managed separately by the Files API.

parameters.name: job_id

schema.description: In-memory job id returned by async or sync inference requests.
schema.title: Job Id

parameters.description: In-memory job id returned by async or sync inference requests.

file.title: File
file.description: File bytes to store and reference from inference requests.

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.description: True when the file record and stored bytes were deleted.

data.title: Data
data.description: Stored files, including uploaded inputs and generated artifacts.

file_id.description: Persistent file id. Use this in FileRef inputs or download it with GET /v1/files/{file_id}/download.

filename.title: Filename
filename.description: Original or generated filename associated with the stored bytes.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: Media type of the stored file.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the file was stored.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Capability-specific metadata such as seed, request params, timings, dimensions, or artifact kind.

FileRecord.title: FileRecord
FileRecord.description:
A stored file's metadata. Doubles as the Files API response schema.

``path`` is the on-disk location and is internal to the file store; it is
excluded from serialization so ``model_dump()`` yields the API/sidecar shape.

status.title: Status
status.description: Service health marker. The value is ok when the API process is accepting requests.

warm.title: Warm
warm.description: Whether startup warmup has finished. Warmup may skip models that are not activated.

queue_len.title: Queue Len
queue_len.description: Number of jobs waiting in the single-flight worker queue.

memory.description: Resident model memory budget and loaded model snapshot.

relay.description: Status of the relay started with the API server. Null when no relay is configured.

type.description: Job type. Use this to interpret the capability-specific result payload.

params.title: Params
params.description: Request parameters captured for inspection and reproducibility. Secret or large media payloads may be omitted or redacted by endpoints.

id.description: In-memory job id. Jobs are cleared when the kiapi process restarts.

status.description: Job lifecycle state: queued, running, succeeded, failed, or canceled.

result.description: Capability-specific result metadata. Completed generation jobs usually also expose produced file ids in artifacts.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.description: File ids produced by the job. Use GET /v1/files/{file_id} for metadata or /download for bytes.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message when status is failed; otherwise null.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job was created.

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: Unix timestamp when the worker started the job, or null while queued.

finished_at.title: Finished At
finished_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job reached a terminal state, or null while queued/running.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Best-effort completion fraction in [0.0, 1.0]. Null means the job has not reported progress.

progress_label.title: Progress Label
progress_label.description: Short human-readable phase label such as queued, running, denoising, saving, or done.

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.description: True when the job was removed from the in-memory job store.

was_running.title: Was Running
was_running.description: True if the job was running when deleted. Running jobs cannot be interrupted; deletion only forgets the record.

data.title: Data
data.description: Jobs currently retained in the in-memory job store.

loaded.title: Loaded
loaded.description: Resident models currently held in memory.

resident_gb.title: Resident Gb
resident_gb.description: Total resident model weight currently counted against the budget.

budget_gb.title: Budget Gb
budget_gb.description: Effective global memory budget in GB shared by all resident models and the running job's peak headroom.

MemoryStats.title: MemoryStats
MemoryStats.description: Resident model memory budget snapshot, served by ``/health``.

name.description: Name of the relay started with the API server.

running.title: Running
running.description: Whether the relay watch loop is currently running.

failed.title: Failed
failed.description: Whether the relay watch loop stopped after raising an error.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: Capability domain such as chat, embedding, image, audio, video, or web.

repo.title: Repo
repo.description: Upstream model repository, Docker image, or local resource label.

weight_gb.title: Weight Gb
weight_gb.description: Current resident weight estimate in GB.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Eviction priority. Lower values are evicted before higher values under budget pressure.

idle_s.title: Idle S
idle_s.description: Seconds since this resident model was last used.

ttl_s.title: Ttl S
ttl_s.description: Idle TTL in seconds. Null means the resident is pinned until budget pressure or shutdown.

expires_in_s.title: Expires In S
expires_in_s.description: Seconds until TTL eviction. Null when ttl_s is null.

ResidentModelStats.title: ResidentModelStats
ResidentModelStats.description: Snapshot of one resident model held in the memory budget.
